China’s central bank named the continued stability of the country’s capital markets as a priority for 2026, a goal taking on greater significance as global markets are tested by the reverberations of the escalating US-Israel war on Iran.

news.headline: Cyprus leader calls for frank discussion on 'colonial' UK bases
news.summary: The UK's two military bases on Cyprus are a "colonial consequence" on the island, says President Nikos Christodoulides.

news.headline: Millions of children out of school: Yemen's education system on its knees
news.summary: Since 2015 and the outbreak of war between the Houthis, who control the north of Yemen, and the internationally recognised government in the south, the country's education system has been steadily collapsing. news.headline: China’s silence on Iran reveals its true priorities
news.summary: Beijing's muted response shows that when core interests are at stake, even close partners are expendable.

news.headline: PTI leaders yet again denied meeting with Imran
news.summary:
<p>ISLAMABAD: PTI leaders on Thursday were yet again denied a meeting with incarcerated party founder Imran Khan, who is imprisoned in Adiala jail.</p>
